_comment: Regression fixture for the kickoff-brief 'string source_quote_id' failure mode (Bug 6). This is a RAW handoffs-shape payload (source_quotes + rounds[]._raw_entries), NOT a finished data block — test_viewer_build.py feeds it through assemble_data_block and asserts the string id 'e2's source_quote_id '2' is coerced to the integer 2 and links to its source quote. String ids used to link to nothing and drop the entry.

source_quotes.speaker: Maria Lopez
source_quotes.quote: We ask them what they need next.

segments.text: We ask them what they need next.
